content: Cortisol is a hormone I’ve been paying a lot more attention to of late.
Advanced hormone testing and continuous glucose monitoring are making it more realistic to make educated guesses about cortisol's role.
Elevated cortisol can help save our life in fight-or-flight situations.
Peter Attia, MD, is the host of _The Peter Attia Drive_ podcast and founder of _Early Medical_.
Early Medical applies the principles of Medicine 3.0 to patients with the goal of simultaneously lengthening lifespan and increasing healthspan.
